title: [Control systems] Schneider Electric security advisory (AV26-210)
description: On March 10, 2026, Schneider Electric published advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: EcoStruxure Foxboro DCS  versions prior to CS8.1
EcoStruxure Automation Expert  versions prior to v25.0.1
EcoStruxure IT Data Center Expert  versions v9.0 and prior
EcoStruxure Power Monitoring Expert (PME)  versions 2022, 2023, 2023 R2, 2024 and 2024 R2
EcoStruxure Power Operation (EPO) Advanced Reporting and Dashboards Module  versions 2022 and 2024
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
